title: MEA – Section Officer – 60 Posts
applyMode: Offline — through proper channel in prescribed pro-forma (Annexure-I)
shortInfo: The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) has officially released the detailed advertisement for the recruitment of 60 Section Officer positions across india. Candidates can submit their applications Offline starting from 22 May 2026 until the deadline on 17 July 2026 via the official MEA Portal.

basic_details.job_title: MEA Section Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 60 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) has officially released the detailed advertisement for the recruitment of 60 Section Officer positions across india. Candidates can submit their applications Offline starting from 22 May 2026 until the deadline on 17 July 2026 via the official MEA Portal.
basic_details.organization_name: Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), PSP Division, New Delhi
basic_details.application_mode: Offline — through proper channel in prescribed pro-forma (Annexure-I)

how_to_apply: Eligible and interested Central Government Officers must apply in the prescribed pro-forma (Annexure-I of the Circular). The complete application form must be sent through proper channel to the address below latest by 17-07-2026. An advance copy may also be mailed to [email protected] — however, only applications complete in all aspects and forwarded through proper channel will be considered.
